'''Caamasi''' was the official language of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] and spoken by the native [[Caamasi/Legends|Caamasi]] in addition to [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]]. After the devastation of the planet, the surviving Caamasi were able to keep the language alive through the continued use and sharing of [[memnis]] from generation to generation.

{{Language-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
